name: SEAPORT MAN
short_description: SEAPORT MAN is a short horror game where the protagonist, having escaped from a sunken ship, wanders the sea.
detailed_description:
SEAPORT MAN is a short horror game where the protagonist, having escaped from a sunken ship, drifts across the vast ocean.

Story

The ship I was on for work sank due to an accident.

Adrift in a lifeboat, I wandered the endless sea.

Just as I was reaching my limit, I spotted the shadow of an island in the distance.

With my last ounce of strength, I set my sights on reaching it.

Game Features

  • First-person 3D short horror game

  • Retro-style visual effects (can be turned off in settings)

  • Two different endings

Playtime

The game can be completed in about 30 minutes.

Developer's Note

This game was developed solo by a 16-year-old.

Video Streaming Guidelines

Both individuals and companies can upload and stream videos of the game without permission.

If possible, please include a link to the Steam page in the video description.

RAYBIS GAMES is not responsible for any damages resulting from uploading or streaming gameplay videos.

This guideline is subject to change without prior notice.
